title: Future freight and logistics survey: An integrated vehicle-and-shipment-tracking data collection method and a case study in the United States
titleEn: Future freight and logistics survey: An integrated vehicle-and-shipment-tracking data collection method and a case study in the United States
summary: Transportation Research Part E: Logistics and Transportation Review, 205, 104517. (JCR Q1, IF=8.8)
summaryEn: Transportation Research Part E: Logistics and Transportation Review, 205, 104517. (JCR Q1, IF=8.8)
content:
## Future freight and logistics survey

**Authors:** Zhang, Y., Guan, J., Jing, P., You, L., Zhao, F., & Ben-Akiva, M.

**Journal:** Transportation Research Part E: Logistics and Transportation Review, 205, 104517.

**DOI:** [10.1016/j.tre.2025.104517](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.tre.2025.104517)

**Abstract:** This study presents an integrated vehicle-and-shipment-tracking data collection method for freight and logistics surveys, with a case study in the United States.
contentEn:
## Future freight and logistics survey

**Authors:** Zhang, Y., Guan, J., Jing, P., You, L., Zhao, F., & Ben-Akiva, M.

**Journal:** Transportation Research Part E: Logistics and Transportation Review, 205, 104517.

**DOI:** [10.1016/j.tre.2025.104517](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.tre.2025.104517)

**Abstract:** This study presents an integrated vehicle-and-shipment-tracking data collection method for freight and logistics surveys, with a case study in the United States.

title: Oldest old's travel mode choice and new mobility technology acceptance: case in America and China
titleEn: Oldest old's travel mode choice and new mobility technology acceptance: case in America and China
summary: Frontiers in Public Health, 12:1344854. (JCR Q2, IF=3.4)
summaryEn: Frontiers in Public Health, 12:1344854. (JCR Q2, IF=3.4)
content:
## Oldest old's travel mode choice and new mobility technology acceptance

**Authors:** Zhang Y, Guan J, D'Ambrosio LA, Miller J, Lee C, Zhang K and Coughlin JF

**Journal:** Frontiers in Public Health, 12:1344854.

**DOI:** [10.3389/fpubh.2024.1344854](https://doi.org/10.3389/fpubh.2024.1344854)

**Abstract:** A cross-national analysis of mobility patterns and new mobility technology acceptance among the oldest-old in America and China, providing insights on accessibility, aging mobility challenges, and policy interventions.
contentEn:
## Oldest old's travel mode choice and new mobility technology acceptance

**Authors:** Zhang Y, Guan J, D'Ambrosio LA, Miller J, Lee C, Zhang K and Coughlin JF

**Journal:** Frontiers in Public Health, 12:1344854.

**DOI:** [10.3389/fpubh.2024.1344854](https://doi.org/10.3389/fpubh.2024.1344854)

**Abstract:** A cross-national analysis of mobility patterns and new mobility technology acceptance among the oldest-old in America and China, providing insights on accessibility, aging mobility challenges, and policy interventions.
